# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak


apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-jwt-auth
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: https://auth.example.com
    jwksUri: https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json
    fromHeaders:
    - name: authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputPayloadToHeader: "istio-authorization"
    forwardOriginalToken: true
    jwtHeaders:
    - "x-jwt-claims"
    - "x-jwt-sub"
    - "x-jwt-exp"
    - "x-jwt-iat"
    - "x-jwt-aud"
    - "x-jwt-iss"
    - "x-jwt-scope"
    - "x-jwt-roles"
    - "x-jwt-email"
    - "x-jwt-name"
    - "x-jwt-preferred-username"
    - "x-jwt-given-name"
    - "x-jwt-family-name"
    - "x-jwt-middle-name"
    - "x-jwt-nickname"
    - "x-jwt-profile"
    - "x-jwt-picture"
    - "x-jwt-webpage"
    - "x-jwt-gender"
    - "x-jwt-birthdate"
    - "x-jwt-zoneinfo"
    - "x-jwt-locales"
    - "x-jwt-updated-at"
    - "x-jwt-azp"
    - "x-jwt-auth-time"
    - "x-jwt-nonce"
    - "x-jwt-at_hash"
    - "x-jwt-c_hash"
    - "x-jwt-s_hash"
    - "x-jwt-act"
    - "x-jwt-orig"
    - "x-jwt-dest"
    - "x-jwt-jti"
    - "x-jwt-cti"
    - "x-jwt-iss"
    - "x-jwt-sub"
    - "x-jwt-aud"
    - "x-jwt-exp"
    - "x-jwt-iat"
    - "x-jwt-nbf"
    - "x-jwt-jku"
    - "x-jwt-jwk"
    - "x-jwt-kid"
    - "x-jwt-req"
    - "x-jwt-sig"
    - "x-jwt-enc"
    - "x-jwt-cnf"
    - "x-jwt-tp"
    - "x-jwt-tpa"
    - "x-jwt-tpb"
    - "x-jwt-tpc"
    - "x-jwt-tpd"
    - "x-jwt-tpe"
    - "x-jwt-tpf"
    - "x-jwt-tph"
    - "x-jwt-tpi"
